title: PRIMES Ice Cream Scoop 7 inches Nonstick Anti-Freeze One Piece Aluminum Scooper Spoon, Create Perfect Spheres with Our Heavy-Duty Ice Cream Scooper, Easy Clean, for Gelato, Cookie Dough, Sorbet, Almon
features: Sturdy One-Piece Aluminum Build: Crafted from a single piece of aluminum, our spoon ensures robustness and resilience, maintaining its shape over time.

Premium Anti-Freeze Coating: Constructed with high-quality aluminum renowned for its superior heat conductivity, our spoon boasts a non-stick coating that resists freezing, allowing effortless scooping aided by the natural warmth of your hand.

Effortless Usage and Maintenance: Engineered with a seamless arc design, our spoon effortlessly crafts perfectly shaped ice cream balls. Its timeless silhouette eliminates hard-to-reach spots, facilitating easy cleaning and dishwasher compatibility.
Versatile Functionality: Beyond just ice cream, our spoon serves as a versatile tool for scooping fruits like watermelon, cookie dough, or sorbet.
EASY TO CLEAN - Simple yet ergonomic design making it safe for the whole family and easy to clean. Dishwasher Safe or simply wash by hand making clean up fast and easy.
